vendor_identity.name: Zebra Technologies
vendor_identity.summary: Zebra RFID and edge device integration docs exposing tag events, reader management events, local REST APIs, and MQTT payload schemas for asset tracking and telemetry workflows.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Zebra RFID Reader Local REST API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Local REST APIs for reader configuration, service control, and access to Zebra RFID operational data delivery workflows.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Zebra RFID Tag Data Events
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Schema documentation for RFID tag read events including identifiers, timestamps, antenna context, and asset-tracking telemetry emitted by Zebra readers.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Zebra RFID Management Events
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Schema documentation for asynchronous management events covering reader status, health, configuration changes, and operational lifecycle telemetry.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Zebra RFID RAW MQTT Payloads
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Schema documentation for raw MQTT payloads used to stream RFID observations, reader events, and telemetry into downstream platforms.

logistics.name: Logistics
logistics.description: RFID asset tracking, edge device telemetry, reader events, and warehouse execution integrations.
